overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a narrow debris-filled alleyway between a yellow apartment building and an elevated highway, transitioning to an open area with a distinctive blue building, and finally reaching an urban intersection with passing vehicles. The scene features bright midday sunlight, post-industrial decay aesthetics, and futuristic urban architecture in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between apartment building and debris field beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow corridor with a yellow apartment building on the left and piles of debris on the right

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with external air conditioning units and metal ladders
concrete elevated highway or monorail structure with support pillars
scattered piles of discarded furniture, cardboard boxes, and rubble
external HVAC units mounted on the apartment building wall
tall electrical transmission towers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow alleyway flanked by a yellow apartment building on the left and an elevated highway overpass on the right. The ground is covered with dirt and scattered debris, while bright midday sunlight casts harsh shadows across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: debris-filled corridor with shipping containers approaching open area

events.description: vegetation density increases with more bushes and overgrown plants visible among the debris

agents.ego_description: continuing through the debris field, navigating past discarded containers and rubble

entered.detail: large blue metal shipping container lying among the debris
industrial green waste container with white text markings
distinctive two-story blue wooden structure with multiple windows

segments.scene_description: The player progresses through the debris corridor, passing a blue shipping container and green dumpster. A distinctive blue wooden building becomes visible in the distance, and the vegetation grows denser with overgrown bushes and weeds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open lot transitioning to urban street with blue building

events.description: exits the narrow alley into an open area with the blue building directly ahead
reaches the paved street with traffic lights and urban infrastructure visible

agents.ego_description: emerging from the alley into an open lot, passing an NPC pedestrian, and approaching the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the open area in front of the blue building

entered.detail: metal chain-link fence running parallel to the street
asphalt urban street with red curbs and lane markings
standard traffic signal pole with green light illuminated

segments.scene_description: The player exits the narrow alley into an open lot dominated by a blue wooden building, passing an NPC pedestrian. The environment transitions from dirt to grassy terrain before reaching a paved urban street with traffic lights and a chain-link fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic and commercial buildings

events.description: red truck and black car pass through the intersection
camera pans left to observe the surrounding urban environment and billboards

agents.ego_description: standing at the intersection, observing passing traffic and the surrounding cityscape

notable_agents.action: red pickup truck driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: tall commercial building with large digital billboards displaying advertisements
elevated transit track structure running above the street level
futuristic high-rise building with reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: The player reaches a busy urban intersection with passing vehicles including a red truck. The camera pans to reveal a futuristic cityscape with towering glass buildings, large digital billboards, and elevated monorail tracks against a clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, debris-strewn alleyway into a sprawling, futuristic urban intersection. It begins by moving through a narrow corridor flanked by a yellow apartment building and an elevated highway overpass, where bright midday sunlight creates harsh shadows across the dirt ground. As the camera progresses past a blue shipping container and green dumpster, the path opens up and the terrain shifts toward denser vegetation and overgrown weeds. The scene then expands into an open lot dominated by a blue wooden building, transitioning from grassy earth to a paved street as the camera passes a pedestrian and a chain-link fence. Finally, the movement culminates at a busy intersection with passing vehicles, panning upward to reveal a towering cityscape of glass skyscrapers, digital billboards, and elevated monorail tracks under a clear blue sky.
